sowing.method: Dibbling on raised beds or furrows

seed_rate.notes: 1.5-2.0 kg/ha of high-quality hybrid seeds is sufficient.

sowing.soil_conditions: Sandy loam riverbeds or well-drained loams with pH 6.0-7.0.

irrigation.notes: Ensure moderate moisture. Avoid wet foliage to prevent mildew.
Ensure regular water supply to avoid growth checks and misshapen fruit.
Reduce or stop irrigation. Too much water at ripening reduces sugars and causes fruits to split.

fertilizer.method: Soil incorporate during furrow layout preparation
Side dressing along the hills or drip fertigation
fertilizer.notes: Apply nitrogen to promote fast leaf shoot extension.

maturity_indicators: Half-slip or full-slip stage (fruit detaches easily from vine with slight pressure)
Skin color turns yellow-green and rind develops clear netting
harvest.harvest_method: Hand harvesting by twisting the stalk gently
harvest.notes: Harvest in early morning to prevent sun heat warming the rind. Store in cool shade.
